name: Lina Malinas Mansion
description: WELCOME to your Brand-New Lina Malinas Mansion ! After your confrontation with Lina in the PL DLC, she was nice enough to share the blueprints of her Mansion so that you can build your own! Now YOU TOO can geek out and be a Super-Fan while living in a luxurious Lina Malina Themed Mansion with an added Garage and an Outdoor Firepit/seating Area !
